name: IpBind
title: IpBind
syntax: long IpBind( dword socket, dword address, dword port); // form 1
socket.Bind( dword address, dword port); // form 1
description: The function associates an address and a port with the specified socket, after an unbound socket has been generated with TcpOpen(0, 0).
Do not use IpBind when you are working with TcpConnect or TcpListen because these two commands bind the socket implicitly.

parameters.name: socket
parameters.description: The socket handle of the socket to be bound.
